chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 58 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 07.01.2026 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imdad Hyder Solangi, Advocate for complainant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant Aijaz Hussain Laghari is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicant states under instructions that this application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Ordered accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
